title: The Art of Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith
content:

'''''The Art of Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith''''' is a collection of various concept art and other works produced during the making of [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Revenge of the Sith'']]. It unveils never-before-seen images—storyboards, models, production sketches, and [[Industrial Light & Magic|ILM]]-generated art—that chronicle the journey from first draft to theater screen. Among the hundreds of pieces are images and anecdotes covering [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] then and now—the new look of the ultimate ''Star Wars'' icon; conceptual looks at the climactic lightsaber duel between Anakin Skywalker and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]; the evolution of General [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] from initial sketches to ILM animation art; images of costumes, weapons, landscapes, and spacecraft; exclusive interviews with the artists; and excerpts from Episode III's Visual Script, created to help guide production through the film's digital creations.

==Contents==
*Part I - Preproduction
*Part II - Principal Photography
*Part III - Digital Shot Creation
*Notes & Index
